blocks.text: Match preview: Sri Lanka U19 face India U19 in 1st unofficial Test (TEST) on Mon, 13 Jul, 2026, 9:30 am at Galle International Stadium Galle. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka U19 vs India U19
India U19 tour of Sri Lanka 2026

blocks.text: Spin-friendly Sri Lankan tracks; deteriorate quickly on day 4–5 in Tests.
Heavy drizzle · High 30°C / Low 25°C · Rain: 6.9 mm · Wind: up to 25 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
